rationale: Educ. Code §19.002 establishes the Windham School District within TDCJ facilities. It contains no reference to property tax, homestead exemptions, or appraised value limits, so the proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) change does not conflict.
quote: Sec. 19.002. ESTABLISHMENT. The school district established by the Texas Board of Corrections in 1969 shall be known as the Windham School District, an entity that is separate and distinct from the Texas Department of Criminal Justice.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to homestead exemption or property tax; no conflict identified.
